overview: A private, password-protected couple website with a wine red romantic luxury aesthetic. Features an animated welcome screen, interactive polaroid photo wall, love meter widget, live time-since-we-met counter, floating hearts, cursor sparkles, and a scrolling page with parallax effects — all personalized for Aidan and Falak.
features: Animated 'Welcome to Pixel Love' hero screen
Interactive polaroid photo wall with fullscreen lightbox, hover captions, shuffle & slideshow modes
Love Meter widget with random 95–100% reveal
Floating hearts on click, cursor sparkle trail
Wine Red / Deep Burgundy / Gold / Soft Pink color scheme
